out_of_scope_note: Synthesis monograph (Oxford University Press book, DOI 10.1093/oso/...) comparing AI systems and biological brains side by side across perception, memory, control, language, and knowledge structure. No empirical study, no specific computational claim to ground — a textbook-style bridge between cognitive science and AI rather than primary research. Lab tracks empirical / mechanistic papers, not book-length syntheses.
